meals.name: Greek yogurt, mixed berries, honey & granola
instructions: Spoon the yogurt into a bowl.
Top with mixed berries and granola.
Drizzle with honey and serve.

meals.name: 3-egg + egg white omelette, spinach, feta, sourdough
instructions: Whisk the eggs and egg whites together.
Wilt the spinach in a non-stick pan with the olive oil.
Pour in the eggs, scatter feta over the top, and cook until just set.
Fold and serve with toasted sourdough.

meals.name: Protein oats with peanut butter & banana
instructions: Cook the oats with milk until creamy.
Stir through the protein powder off the heat.
Top with sliced banana and peanut butter.

meals.name: Smoked salmon, scrambled eggs, rye toast
instructions: Scramble the eggs gently over low heat.
Toast the rye bread.
Serve the eggs with smoked salmon on top, a squeeze of lemon, and black pepper.

meals.name: Cottage cheese pancakes with blueberries
instructions: Blend the cottage cheese, eggs, and oat flour until smooth.
Cook small pancakes in a non-stick pan, about 2 minutes per side.
Top with blueberries and a drizzle of honey.

meals.name: Grilled chicken, jasmine rice, broccoli
instructions: Season and grill the chicken breast until cooked through.
Steam the broccoli.
Serve over rice with a drizzle of olive oil.

meals.name: Tuna, chickpea & cherry tomato salad
instructions: Combine the tuna, chickpeas, tomatoes, and red onion in a bowl.
Dress with olive oil and lemon juice.
Toss and serve.

meals.name: Turkey & avocado wholemeal wrap
instructions: Spread the wrap with mayo or hummus.
Layer turkey, avocado, and salad leaves.
Roll tightly and slice in half.

meals.name: Prawn & quinoa Buddha bowl
instructions: Pan-fry the prawns for 2-3 minutes each side until pink.
Arrange the quinoa, edamame, avocado, and carrot in a bowl.
Top with prawns and drizzle with soy-sesame dressing.

meals.name: Beef & vegetable stir-fry with noodles
instructions: Cook the noodles according to packet instructions.
Stir-fry the beef over high heat until browned, then set aside.
Stir-fry the vegetables with garlic and ginger, then return the beef to the pan.
Toss through the noodles with soy sauce and sesame oil.

meals.name: Lean steak, sweet potato mash, green beans
instructions: Boil and mash the sweet potato with a little butter.
Season and pan-sear the steak to your liking.
Steam the green beans.
Rest the steak for a few minutes before serving.

meals.name: Salmon fillet, quinoa, roasted asparagus
instructions: Roast the salmon and asparagus with olive oil at 200C for 12-15 minutes.
Serve over quinoa with a squeeze of lemon.

meals.name: Turkey mince chilli with rice
instructions: Brown the turkey mince with onion and pepper.
Add the chopped tomatoes, kidney beans, and spices.
Simmer for 20 minutes.
Serve over rice.

meals.name: Baked cod, crushed new potatoes, tenderstem broccoli
instructions: Boil the new potatoes until tender, then crush lightly with olive oil.
Bake the cod at 200C for 15 minutes with lemon and herbs.
Steam the tenderstem broccoli.
Serve together.

meals.name: Chicken fajita bowl with peppers and black beans
instructions: Season the chicken with fajita spices and pan-fry with the peppers and onion until cooked through.
Warm the black beans.
Serve over rice with a squeeze of lime.

meals.name: Protein shake (whey + milk)
instructions: Shake or blend all ingredients together.

meals.name: Cottage cheese & pineapple
instructions: Combine the cottage cheese and pineapple in a bowl.

meals.name: Handful of almonds & an apple
instructions: Eat as is.

meals.name: Rice cakes with peanut butter
instructions: Spread the peanut butter over the rice cakes.
